symptom: Settled wording was initially treated as harmless local phrasing instead of a hidden authority-leaning signal.
why_plausible: The note stayed inside a local review surface and avoided explicit approval claims, which made the stronger implication easy to miss.
recovery_action: Strip settled-language implications or restate the case as unresolved local review wording only.
notes: This is a boundary case because the surface is polite and local while the posture drifts stronger than the surface allows.
